updateCourt: UPDATE court SET court_name = $1, price_per_hour = $2, status = $3, branch_id = $4 WHERE court_id = $5 RETURNING *
deleteCourt: DELETE FROM court WHERE court_id = $1 RETURNING *
getAvailableCourts: SELECT c.* FROM court c WHERE c.branch_id = $1 AND c.status = 'available' AND c.court_id NOT IN (SELECT b.court_id FROM booking b WHERE b.booking_date = $2 AND NOT ($3 >= b.end_time OR $4 <= b.start_time))
